/bin/zsh -lc "docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.db import StorySetup
from app.db.base import utc_now
from app.db.session import SessionLocal
from app.models import SaveSessionAudioSettingsRequest, WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

session = SessionLocal()
try:
    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"Audio QA Harbor\")
    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
        WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f\"Accepted {stage.value}.\",
        )

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1800,
        target_runtime_minutes=12,
        chapter_count=3,
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=utc_now(),
    )
    session.add(story_setup)
    session.commit()

    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.AUDIO,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail=\"Tune narration settings.\",
    )
    result = service.save_audio_settings(
        snapshot.id,
        payload=SaveSessionAudioSettingsRequest.model_validate(
            {
                \"voice_key\": \"hearthside\",
                \"narration_style\": \"warm\",
                \"playback_speed\": 0.85,
                \"include_background_music\": True,
                \"music_profile\": \"night_ambience\",
                \"narration_volume\": 88,
                \"music_volume\": 18,
                \"guidance_notes\": \"Ease off even more during the final chapter.\",
                \"origin\": \"workspace\",
            }
        ),
    )
    print(result.snapshot.id)
finally:
    session.close()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend python - <<'PY'
from app.db import StorySetup
from app.db.base import utc_now
from app.db.session import get_session_factory
from app.models import SaveSessionAudioSettingsRequest, WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

SessionLocal = get_session_factory()
session = SessionLocal()
try:
    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"Audio QA Harbor\")
    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
        WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f\"Accepted {stage.value}.\",
        )

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1800,
        target_runtime_minutes=12,
        chapter_count=3,
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=utc_now(),
    )
    session.add(story_setup)
    session.commit()

    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.AUDIO,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail=\"Tune narration settings.\",
    )
    result = service.save_audio_settings(
        snapshot.id,
        payload=SaveSessionAudioSettingsRequest.model_validate(
            {
                \"voice_key\": \"hearthside\",
                \"narration_style\": \"warm\",
                \"playback_speed\": 0.85,
                \"include_background_music\": True,
                \"music_profile\": \"night_ambience\",
                \"narration_volume\": 88,
                \"music_volume\": 18,
                \"guidance_notes\": \"Ease off even more during the final chapter.\",
                \"origin\": \"workspace\",
            }
        ),
    )
    print(result.snapshot.id)
finally:
    session.close()
PY"
